key_findings: BEAUTY × Evergreen (n=90, eng=21%): → indoor + warm_studio + lifestyle_integrated
BEAUTY × National Sports Day (n=3, eng=0%): → restaurant_indoor + mixed_ambient + graphic_text
BEAUTY_PERSONAL_CARE × Evergreen (n=262, eng=1%): → salon + golden_hour + text_dominant
BEAUTY_PERSONAL_CARE × Ramadan (n=13, eng=7%): → studio + natural + lifestyle_integrated
F_AND_B × Evergreen (n=1243, eng=36%): → retail_urban + dramatic_moody + multi_product
F_AND_B × General (n=172, eng=27%): → retail_store + natural + overhead_spread
REAL_ESTATE × Evergreen (n=103, eng=2%): → office + flat_bright + text_dominant
REAL_ESTATE × Ramadan (n=3, eng=0%): → outdoor + natural + lifestyle_integrated
RETAIL × Evergreen (n=23, eng=30%): → home_domestic + natural_daylight + documentary_candid
RETAIL_LIFESTYLE × Evergreen (n=284, eng=6%): → outdoor + unknown + text_dominant
RETAIL_LIFESTYLE × Seasonal (n=26, eng=3%): → unknown + unknown + lifestyle_integrated
FASHION × Eid Al Fitr (n=37, eng=40%): → unknown + unknown + lifestyle_integrated
FASHION × Evergreen (n=33, eng=48%): → unknown + unknown + text_dominant
Best setting: 'retail_urban' (100%) → natural_daylight light + product_hero_closeup frame
how_to_use: Step 1: client sector + content occasion → look up sector_occasion_decision_tree → get recommended_production (setting, lighting, composition, register, tone). Step 2: confirm with setting_guide — use best_lighting and best_composition for that setting. Step 3: cross-check lighting_composition_guide to ensure lighting+framing alignment.
